commit.message:
Enable ecdsa_sha1 for the DisabledCurve.java test

A prior commit (13e2a4c8) added ecdsa_sha1 to the list of disabled
algorithms, but that patch didn't make the corresponding change to
DisabledCurve.java.  This patch adds ecdsa_sha1 to the list of
re-enabled algorithms since the test requires it.
